required_preferences.fact: Completes his full CPAP setup routine—including machine assembly and mask checks—as his last activity before bed, abstaining from food or drinks (including herbal tea) for at least 30 minutes prior

supersedes.fact: Prepares a nightly herbal tea as his last activity before bed, never consumes food after 10pm

required_preferences.fact: Starts the day with an audio journal entry recorded on his phone — avoids all typing or device use in the morning per occupational therapy recommendation

supersedes.fact: Starts the day with a digital journal entry using a dedicated app — never journals on paper

required_preferences.fact: Now keeps his phone and other electronics on the opposite side of the bedroom overnight to avoid screen-induced insomnia and prevent interference with CPAP compliance feedback
Takes scheduled 15-minute breaks every hour to rest his wrists and do occupational therapy exercises as prescribed
Reads sci-fi novels in print format, never on tablets or e-readers
Plans coordinated virtual movie nights with his girlfriend every other week, using streaming apps to share experiences despite distance

persona: A 28-year-old data scientist working remotely for a healthcare startup
